name: TIPO Open Data API
description: Taiwan Intellectual Property Office (TIPO) Open Data API provides access to patent and trademark gazette data published by the Taiwan government. Includes patent search, publication data, and gazette information. Note: Documentation was extracted from a JavaScript SPA; some endpoint details are inferred from the TIPO open data portal structure.
